rulings.Case Title: IN RE: QUALITY LOAN SERVICE CORP.
rulings.Calendar Matter: HEARING RE: SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 6, 2024 line 1. Hearing Re: Surplus Funds from Proceeds. Having considered three claims presented to the Court, the claim of Rizing Capital 8, LLC is senior and superior to other claims and shall be paid out of the funds on file with the Court in the amount of $33,774 (and interest if any accrued since July 31, 2024). =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: JASON SELLO VS. COMPASS CALIFORNIA II, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Liza Milanes
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 6, 2024 line 3. Motion for Determination of Good Faith Settlement is GRANTED. Moving party carried their burden under Tech-Built, therefore the cause of action for Implied and/or Equitable Indemnity in the operative cross-complaint is dismissed. All other causes of action in the cross-complaint remain as they are based, at least in part, on direct liability independent from "liability for contribution or equitable indemnity to any other joint tortfeasor or co-obligor." =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: LEANA PEREZ ET AL VS. BIANA CHERNOGUZ, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 6, 2024 line 5. Cross-Defendant's Demurrer to Amended Cross-Complaint is continued to December 31, 2024 for cross-complainant to comply with the Court's January 31, 2024; February 23, 2024; and March 15, 2024 order. The action shall be stayed as to the cross-complaint only until compliance with such orders. The rest of the action shall proceed.
